g.text: Scholarly Discovery Plan for Video Generation Models: evidence-grounded dossier
This dossier is bounded by the approved search, staged corpus, retrieval time, and
available evidence. It does not establish exhaustive coverage or novelty.
The Scriptwriter System Message Role Definition specifies that AI microfilm scripts
must be visually concise, logically coherent, emotionally resonant, and technically
feasible for AI video generation tools. [arxiv:2508.08487v5, page 18, part 1;
MA ViS is a multi-agent framework for end-to-end long-sequence video generation that
operates under the 3E Principle (Explore, Examine, Enhance) to iteratively refine
outputs across multiple stages. [arxiv:2508.08487v5, page 2, part 2;
6 staged · 6 evidence · Enter send · / commands · ? help
